description: The project 'DateUtilsLegacy' is currently a plain Java project in Eclipse that uses a manually added Joda-Time JAR (lib/joda-time-2.12.5.jar) on its build path. Convert this project to a Maven project using Group ID 'com.legacy.dateutils', Artifact ID 'DateUtilsLegacy', and Version '1.0.0'. Replace the manual JAR dependency with a Maven dependency for joda-time:joda-time:2.12.5. Ensure the project, including source files DateFormatter.java, DateCalculator.java, and App.java, compiles successfully after the conversion.
